materials: DK yarn in the colour(s) of your choice
A button if you aren’t going to crochet one

rounds.summary: Create a foundation chain of 12 stitches.
rounds.title: Chain 12

rounds.rawInstruction: Starting in the 2nd chain from the hook and working in one side of the chain, work as follows, 2 HTC in first stitch, 1 HTC in each of the next 8 stitches, 2HTC in the next stitch, working in the other side of the chain, 2 HTC in the next stitch, 1HTC in each of the next 8 stitches, 2 HTC in the last stitch, join to the 1st HTC. You should have 24 stitches in total. Mark the beginning of your round with a stitch marker.
rounds.summary: Work increases around the foundation chain to form an oval base, then mark the start.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 HTC in each stitch all the way around (24)
rounds.summary: Work one half treble crochet in each stitch around for five rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 2-6

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 DC in each stitch all the way around (24)
rounds.summary: Switch to double crochet and work one in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 7

rounds.rawInstruction: Now we will begin to work the flap, from here on we will be working in rows back and forth.
rounds.summary: Transition from working in rounds to working in rows for the flap.
rounds.title: Begin working the flap in rows back and forth.

rounds.rawInstruction: 1DC, 1DC, CH 2, turn, 1 HTC in the next 10 stitches, CH 2, turn. (10)
rounds.summary: Work two double crochets, chain 2, turn, then work half treble crochets across and chain 2 to turn.
rounds.title: Row 1

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 HTC in each stitch all the way across, CH 2, turn (10)
rounds.summary: Work one half treble crochet across each row, chain 2, and turn for eight rows.
rounds.title: Rows 2-9

rounds.rawInstruction: 2HTCtog, 1HTC, 1HTC, CH2, skip the next 2 stitches, 1HTC, 1HTC, 2HTCtog, CH2, turn (8)
rounds.summary: Create the buttonhole by decreasing and chaining to skip stitches.
rounds.title: Row 10

rounds.summary: Work one half treble crochet across and fasten off.
rounds.title: Row 11

rounds.summary: Create a magic ring to begin the button.
rounds.title: Start with a magic ring

rounds.summary: Work twelve treble crochets into the ring and join.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.summary: Slip stitch into each stitch around to finish the button.
rounds.title: Round 2

rounds.rawInstruction: Line the button up with where the button hole on the flap lies when in position at the front of the pouch, (you can mark this with a stitch marker) and sew into place.
rounds.summary: Position and sew the button onto the flap.
rounds.title: Line the button up with where the button hole on the flap lies when in position at the front of the pouch, (you can mark this with a stitch marker) and sew into place.

rounds.summary: Secure and hide all loose yarn tails.
rounds.title: Weave in the ends.
